name: Add a status filter to GET /tasks (self-contained guardrail)
prompt: Add an optional `status` query parameter to GET /tasks that filters the returned tasks by their status (one of todo, in_progress, done). When `status` is omitted, return all tasks as before. Keep existing behavior and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Storage
memory_seed.summary: Data is held in-process in app/db.py: USERS and TASKS dicts; there is no database. Tasks have id, title, status, owner_id, updated_at.

memory_seed.title: Endpoint style
memory_seed.summary: Read endpoints return Pydantic models directly and use plain query parameters (see actor_id on PATCH /tasks/{id}).

requirements.description: Filtering by status returns only matching tasks
Omitting the filter returns all tasks
